revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hAudio | data = an audio recording's details
| subtemplates = Date-of-publication ("published") information will only be included in the microformat if {{tl|start date}} (or, where appropriate, {{tl|start date and age}}) is used in a parent infobox/template. Do not, however, use {{tlf|start date}} or {{tlf|start date and age}} [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
Use {{tl|duration}} to specify the duration/length of a recording. For instance, if the recording's duration is 3 minutes 45 seconds, use {{tlc|duration|m{{=}}3|s{{=}}45}} (which appears as: {{duration|m=3|s=45}}). If needed, {{para|h}} may be included to specify a number of hours.
|haudio |fn |album |description |category |contributor |duration |h |item |min |photo |position |price |published |s | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Templates generating hAudio microformats|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hAudio | data = an audio recording's details
| subtemplates = Date-of-publication ("published") information will only be included in the microformat if {{tl|start date}} (or, where appropriate, {{tl|start date and age}}) is used in a parent infobox/template. Do not, however, use {{tlf|start date}} or {{tlf|start date and age}} [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
Use {{tl|duration}} to specify the duration/length of a recording. For instance, if the recording's duration is 3 minutes 45 seconds, use {{tlc|duration|m{{=}}3|s{{=}}45}} (which appears as: {{duration|m=3|s=45}}). If needed, {{para|h}} may be included to specify a number of hours.
|haudio |fn |album |description |category |contributor |duration |h |item |min |photo |position |price |published |s | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Templates generating hAudio microformats|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hAudio | data = an audio recording's details
| subtemplates = Date-of-publication ("published") information will only be included in the microformat if {{tl|start date}} (or, where appropriate, {{tl|start date and age}}) is used in a parent infobox/template. Do not, however, use {{tlf|start date}} or {{tlf|start date and age}} [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
Use {{tl|duration}} to specify the duration/length of a recording. For instance, if the recording's duration is 3 minutes 45 seconds, use {{tlc|duration|m{{=}}3|s{{=}}45}} (which appears as: {{duration|m=3|s=45}}). If needed, {{para|h}} may be included to specify a number of hours.
|haudio |fn |album |description |category |contributor |duration |h |item |min |photo |position |price |published |s | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Templates generating hAudio microformats|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hAudio | data = an audio recording's details
| subtemplates = Date-of-publication ("published") information will only be included in the microformat if {{tl|start date}} (or, where appropriate, {{tl|start date and age}}) is used in a parent infobox/template. Do not, however, use {{tlf|start date}} or {{tlf|start date and age}} [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
Use {{tl|duration}} to specify the duration/length of a recording. For instance, if the recording's duration is 3 minutes 45 seconds, use {{tlc|duration|m{{=}}3|s{{=}}45}} (which appears as: {{duration|m=3|s=45}}). If needed, {{para|h}} may be included to specify a number of hours.
|haudio |fn |album |description |category |contributor |duration |h |item |min |photo |position |price |published |s | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Templates generating hAudio microformats|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hAudio | data = an audio recording's details
| subtemplates = Date-of-publication ("published") information will only be included in the microformat if {{tl|start date}} (or, where appropriate, {{tl|start date and age}}) is used in a parent infobox/template. Do not, however, use {{tlf|start date}} or {{tlf|start date and age}} [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
Use {{tl|duration}} to specify the duration/length of a recording. For instance, if the recording's duration is 3 minutes 45 seconds, use {{tlc|duration|m{{=}}3|s{{=}}45}} (which appears as: {{duration|m=3|s=45}}). If needed, {{para|h}} may be included to specify a number of hours.
|haudio |fn |album |description |category |contributor |duration |h |item |min |photo |position |price |published |s | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates generating hAudio microformats|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{Microformat message | format = hAudio | data = an audio recording's details
| subtemplates = Date-of-publication ("published") information will only be included in the microformat if {{tl|start date}} (or, where appropriate, {{tl|start date and age}}) is used in a parent infobox/template. Do not, however, use {{tlf|start date}} or {{tlf|start date and age}} [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|if a date before 1583 CE is involved]].
Use {{tl|duration}} to specify the duration/length of a recording. For instance, if the recording's duration is 3 minutes 45 seconds, use {{tlc|duration|m{{=}}3|s{{=}}45}} (which appears as: {{duration|m=3|s=45}}). If needed, {{para|h}} may be included to specify a number of hours.
|haudio |fn |album |description |category |contributor |duration |h |item |min |photo |position |price |published |s | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]
[[Category:Templates generating hAudio microformats|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
